notes: Self-applicable patches from curmudgeon WIN-016.c3.json and WIN-014.c4.json (non-verdict). WIN-014 verdict-change patches are in suggested-patches-verdictchange-2026-05-04T09-21.json (pending human review).

patches.rationale: Curmudgeon c3 H1: The 6-29 deg range is unsourced; Section 1.8 does not specify it. Replace with softer 'several degrees' consistent with Section 1.8 wording.

patches.find: rendering the Kramers-Kronig argument empirically confirmed in addition to theoretically required.
patches.replace: rendering the Kramers-Kronig argument empirically confirmed in addition to theoretically required. Independently, stellar aberration varies sinusoidally with a precise one-year period. A static refractive index cannot produce a time-varying angular displacement; the dome must either declare alpha time-varying with an annual phase (which is geometrically equivalent to reintroducing Earth's orbital motion under another name) or abandon the refractive interpretation entirely.
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon c3 H2 (also flagged in c2 but not integrated): Annual-periodicity argument is the strongest independent attack on the static-aether claim and was absent across two review cycles. Adding per curmudgeon recommendation.

patches.find: prediction was timestamped before confirming data was pulled
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon c3 H3: The phrase 'data was pulled' is not in the dome source text (raw-text/03-predictions.txt:13). Fixing to verbatim dome wording to prevent misquote attack.

patches.find: raw noise floors below 1 µGal at minute timescales (Van Camp, 2005; Crossley et al., 2013), so a 10–13 µGal pulse would appear even without Level-3 processing. It saw none.
patches.replace: after tidal and atmospheric reduction, SG residuals reach the 0.1–1 µGal floor (Van Camp, 2005; Crossley et al., 2013); a 10–13 µGal contact-phase pulse exceeding this floor by 10×–100× would be reportable even at Level-2 reduction; the burden is on the dome to identify what processing step would hide it. No such identification has been offered; no contact-phase anomaly was reported.
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon c4 H10: Prior text conflated short-period noise floor with raw SG signal (raw SG is dominated by solid-Earth tides ~150-300 µGal; sub-µGal floor only achieved after tidal/atmospheric reduction). Rewritten to shift burden of proof and avoid raw-vs-processed conflation.

patches.find: PRED-TIER-2 ("−10 to −13 µGal pulse at C1/C4")
patches.replace: PRED-TIER-2 ("10–13 µGal gravity pulse at C1/C4" per data/predictions.json)
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon c4 H11: data/predictions.json PRED-TIER-2.claim uses positive magnitude '10–13 µGal gravity pulse at C1/C4 eclipse contacts'. WIN-014 and WIN-012 use negative sign convention. Harmonizing to canonical positive convention from predictions.json.
